message:
feat(readwrite): add GML graph I/O format for NetworkX parity

New functions (Rust + Python bindings):
- read_gml: parse GML files, auto-detect directed/undirected
- write_gml: serialize graphs to GML format

Features:
- String and integer node label support with proper ID mapping
- Edge attribute preservation (numeric values stay unquoted)
- Comment handling in GML parser
- Escaped string support in tokenizer

I/O format coverage improved from ~44% to ~56%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     write_edgelist,
     write_graphml,
+    read_gml,
+    write_gml,
 )
 
 
@@ -1514,6 +1516,8 @@ def from_scipy_sparse_array(A, parallel_edges=False, create_using=None,
     "write_adjlist",
     "write_edgelist",
     "write_graphml",
+    "read_gml",
+    "write_gml",
     # Drawing
     "draw",
